StrictModeForAllResources.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether to import all analyses and dashboards under strict or lenient mode.

PrefixForAllResources.description: An option to request a prefix to be prepended to each resource's ID before import.

S3Uri.description: The Amazon S3 URI for the asset bundle import file.

description: Represents a QuickSight asset bundle import job.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the import job.

AssetBundleImportJobId.description: The ID of the import job.

AssetBundleImportSource.description: The source of the asset bundle zip file.

AwsAccountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account to import assets into.

CreatedTime.description: The time that the import job was created.

FailureAction.description: The failure action for the import job.

JobStatus.description: Indicates the status of the import job.

OverrideValidationStrategy.description: An optional validation strategy override for all analyses and dashboards.
